revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_BLP_articles_lacking_sources here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
